violations.text: The condensate from the small ice maker in the front is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment to repair drainage system to properly convey condensate to evaporator pan. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
The floor under the sink in the kitchen prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
